candidates.env_strategy: conda clone yolo_env, then pip install openai-whisper
candidates.expected_device_path: cuda if cloned torch remains usable, cpu fallback otherwise
candidates.name: openai_whisper_clone_yolo
candidates.notes: Best first candidate because yolo_env already has Jetson PyTorch CUDA; clone keeps the stable env untouched.

candidates.env_strategy: conda clone yolo_env, then pip install faster-whisper
candidates.expected_device_path: cpu likely first; cuda depends on CTranslate2 aarch64/CUDA wheel compatibility
candidates.name: faster_whisper_clone_yolo
candidates.notes: Good follow-up for optimized inference, but Jetson CUDA wheel compatibility must be proven in isolation.
